title: Haunting of the Ghost Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Drake and Bo face a haunted castle and a ghostly dragon! 👻

q.en: Why does Head Wizard Jayana send Drake and Bo to the land of Gothica?
q.zh: 巫师首领 Jayana 为什么要派 Drake 和 Bo 去哥西亚（Gothica）？

options.en: To visit the Castle of the Wizards
To retrieve the stolen Dream Orb from the evil wizard Zoltan
options.zh: 去从邪恶巫师 Zoltan 手中取回被偷走的梦境宝珠

options.en: To meet the Dragon Master Sandor
To fight the ghosts that haunt Belerion
options.zh: 去对抗困扰 Belerion 的幽灵

explain.en: Zoltan stole the Dream Orb from the Castle of the Wizards, and Jayana needs Drake and Bo to bring it back before he can use it.
explain.zh: Zoltan 从巫师城堡偷走了梦境宝珠，Jayana 需要 Drake 和 Bo 在他使用前把它取回来。

q.en: What special power does Bo's Water Dragon, Shu, have that helps the team?
q.zh: Bo 的水龙 Shu 拥有什么特殊能力，对团队很有帮助？

options.en: She can breathe fire
She can freeze enemies solid
She can break spells with her healing mist
options.zh: 她能用治愈之雾解除咒语

options.en: She can fly faster than any other dragon

explain.en: Shu's blue healing mist breaks the binding spell that Zoltan used to trap Sandor and Phantom at the castle.
explain.zh: Shu 蓝色的治愈之雾解除了 Zoltan 用来把 Sandor 和 Phantom 困在城堡的束缚咒。

q.en: Who are Sandor and Phantom when Drake and Bo first meet them?
q.zh: Drake 和 Bo 初次遇见时，Sandor 和 Phantom 是什么人？

options.en: A Dragon Master and his Ghost Dragon trapped by Zoltan
options.zh: 一位被 Zoltan 困住的训龙师和他的幽灵龙

options.en: Two of Zoltan's friendly wizards
options.zh: Zoltan 手下两位友善的巫师

options.en: Villagers from the land of Gothica
Guards from the Castle of the Wizards

explain.en: Sandor is a young Dragon Master and Phantom is his Ghost Dragon; Zoltan keeps them prisoner with a binding spell and makes them guard the castle.
explain.zh: Sandor 是年轻的训龙师，Phantom 是他的幽灵龙；Zoltan 用束缚咒把他们囚禁，还逼他们看守城堡。

q.zh: 是什么让 Phantom 成为一条'幽灵龙'？

options.en: He breathes blue fire
He is very large and heavy
He has bright red scales
He can float through walls and doors and vanish in an instant
options.zh: 他能穿过墙壁和门飘浮，并能瞬间消失

explain.en: Phantom's ghostlike powers let him float through solid objects and disappear, which is why he can spy and escape so easily.
explain.zh: Phantom 的幽灵般能力让他能穿墙飘浮并瞬间消失，这也是他能轻易侦察和逃脱的原因。

q.en: What is the answer to the riddle on the pillar in the belfry: 'Where you go, I will pursue. I will always copy you. But hugging me is something you can't do.'?
q.zh: 城堡钟楼石柱上的谜语答案是什么？'你走到哪里，我就跟到哪里。我总是模仿你。但你却无法拥抱我。'

options.en: A reflection in a mirror
A shadow
The wind
An echo

explain.en: Drake solves it — a shadow follows and copies you everywhere but can never be hugged, which releases the glass dome over the spell book.
explain.zh: Drake 解开了谜底——影子处处跟随并模仿你，却无法被拥抱，于是罩着咒语书的玻璃罩被打开了。

options.en: Sandor's pet cats
Two friendly dragons
Zoltan's ghost minions kept in a magical box
options.zh: Zoltan 养在魔法盒子里的一对幽灵随从

options.en: The guards of the Castle of the Wizards

explain.en: Creak and Sneak are two not-too-bright ghosts who work for Zoltan and live inside his magical box until he needs them.
explain.zh: Creak 和 Sneak 是 Zoltan 手下不太聪明的两个幽灵，平时就住在他的魔法盒子里，等他召唤。

q.en: How do the Dragon Masters open the gear-covered door to Zoltan's workshop?
q.zh: 训龙师们是如何打开 Zoltan 工作室那扇布满齿轮的大门？

options.en: Shu blasts water to turn the gears of the water lock
options.zh: Shu 喷水流转动水锁的齿轮

options.en: Worm freezes the door shut
They find a hidden key
options.zh: 他们找到了一把藏起来的钥匙

options.en: Phantom floats through the wall

explain.en: Bo realizes it is a water lock, and Shu streams water at the top gear; as the gears turn one by one, the lock clicks open.
explain.zh: Bo 发现这是水锁，Shu 朝最上面的齿轮喷水；齿轮逐个转动，锁便咔哒一声打开了。

q.en: How does Drake trick Creak and Sneak so the others can trap them in their box?
q.zh: Drake 怎样骗过 Creak 和 Sneak，好让同伴把它们关回盒子里？

options.en: He freezes them with Worm's power
options.zh: 他用 Worm 的力量把她们冻住

options.en: He throws the real Dream Orb at them
options.zh: 他把真正的梦境宝珠扔向她们

options.en: Shu washes them away with a wave
options.zh: Shu 用浪花把她们冲走

options.en: He fakes the orb with Worm's green energy bubble and lures them into the box
options.zh: 他用 Worm 的绿色能量球伪装成宝珠，把她们诱进盒子里

explain.en: Drake holds up Worm's glowing green energy bubble to look like the orb; the ghosts dive after it, and Bo and Sandor slam the lid shut.
explain.zh: Drake 举起 Worm 发光的绿色能量球，假装是宝珠；幽灵扑上去追，Bo 和 Sandor 立刻把盒盖合上。

q.en: Why can Zoltan never trap Worm inside the Dream World?
q.zh: 为什么 Zoltan 永远无法把 Worm 困在梦境世界？

options.en: Worm is too small to be trapped
An Earth Dragon's connection to the earth is too strong
options.zh: 地龙与大地之间的联系太过强大

options.en: Zoltan actually likes Worm
The Dream World is already closed

explain.en: Jayana explains that Earth Dragons can never be trapped in the Dream World because their bond with the earth is too strong.
explain.zh: Jayana 解释说，地龙与大地相连，这种联系太过强大，所以永远无法被梦境世界困住。

q.en: What does Drake do to stop Zoltan from escaping through the pathway to the Dream World?
q.zh: 为了阻止 Zoltan 从通往梦境世界的通道逃走，Drake 做了什么？

options.en: He freezes Zoltan in place
options.zh: 他把 Zoltan 冻在原地

options.en: He hands the orb to Sandor
He pushes Zoltan into the light pathway and grabs the orb to close it
options.zh: 他把 Zoltan 推进光之通道，并抓住宝珠关闭了通道

options.en: He asks Jayana for help

explain.en: Drake shoves Zoltan into the pathway, then grabs the Dream Orb, which stops spinning and closes the doorway behind the wizard.
explain.zh: Drake 把 Zoltan 推进通道，然后抓住梦境宝珠，宝珠停止旋转，通道在巫师身后关闭了。
